title: Wooly Animals
description: Cold Cows and Pigs drop Wool (as do variants from Earth Animals)!
body:
**Cold Cows** and **Cold Pigs** drop **Brown Wool** upon death. This is inspired by the Brown Wool drop from Wooly Cows in Minecraft Earth. This pack is **compatible** with [Earth Animals](https://modrinth.com/datapack/earth-animals), making Wooly Cows drop Brown Wool and Umbra Cows drop Black Wool (since v1.1.0). ## ### MintRefresh:
